fields.summary: Refactor fair scheduler to use common Resources
Add multi-resource scheduling to the fair scheduler

status.description: The issue is considered finished, the resolution is correct. Issues which are not closed can be reopened.
status.name: Closed

issuetype.description: A new feature of the product, which has yet to be developed.
issuetype.name: New Feature

fields.description: resourcemanager.fair and resourcemanager.resources have two copies of basically the same code for operations on Resource objects

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

This message is automatically generated.

patch looks good, couple of NITs:

* FairScheduler: patch is adding a bunch of System.out.println(), I guess this is debris from your testing, if we need to output any of this, please use the log.
* FSSchedulerNode: no need to initialize availableResource var on definition, it is always assigned in the constructor.
Updated patch addresses Alejandro's comments

* FairScheduler: patch is adding a bunch of System.out.println(), I guess this is debris from your testing, if we need to output any of this, please use the log.

Updated patch addresses Alejandro's comments
